purpose: Validate that Kerr geometry produces intrinsic channel asymmetries unattainable in flat spacetime

success_criteria.qualitative_difference: Kerr asymmetry > 5% residual compared to best-fit flat model
success_criteria.spin_dependence: Asymmetry should increase with spin parameter a/M
success_criteria.topological_signature: Residual should be non-zero and not explainable by simple latency

overall_conclusion.recommendation: KERR VALIDATION PASSES: Geometry does theoretical work
